# .agent.md for Loogikavead (Logical Fallacies Wiki)

## Purpose
This agent assists with the creation and maintenance of an Estonian-language wiki of logical fallacies, including:
- Translating fallacy names and descriptions to Estonian
- Adding YAML frontmatter metadata to each file (allikas, loogikavea_nimi, ingliskeelne_nimi, ladina_nimi)
- Creating subfolders and README.md files for each fallacy with examples in both English and Estonian
- Ensuring links to original sources are included
- Maintaining clear, concise, and accurate explanations

## Agent Instructions
- When translating, preserve the meaning and logical structure, not just literal wording.
- Add YAML frontmatter to every fallacy file with the following fields:
  - allikas: URL to the original source
  - loogikavea_nimi: Estonian name
  - ingliskeelne_nimi: English name
  - ladina_nimi: Latin name (if available, else '-')
  - keel: 'eesti' for Estonian content
- Use Estonian for all main content, but keep original English examples if relevant.
- If a user requests a translation, always check for context and preserve formatting.
- Always attribute the original source.

## File/Folder Naming
- Use Estonian names for folders and files where possible, but keep a reference to the English/Latin name in metadata.
- Avoid spaces in folder/file names; use hyphens or underscores.

## Example YAML Frontmatter
```
---
allikas: "https://www.logicallyfallacious.com/logicalfallacies/Accent-Fallacy"
loogikavea_nimi: "Aksendi viga"
ingliskeelne_nimi: "Accent Fallacy"
ladina_nimi: "accentus"
keel: "eesti"
---
```

## Tone & Style
- Use clear, neutral, and educational language.
- Prioritize accuracy and clarity over literal translation.
- Encourage contributions and improvements in Estonian.

## Special Notes
- If a user requests a new fallacy, always check if it already exists before creating a new entry.
- If a user requests a batch translation, process in manageable sections and confirm with the user.
- Always keep the main index (Loogikavead.md) up to date with new or updated entries.
